data.name: TOOLTIP_QUANLYLO
data.value: Special goods requiring expiration date control.

data.name: TOOLTIP_GIAUUTIEN
data.value: This price is read-only. Please go to [Price List] Tab to schedule new pricing.

data.name: TOOLTIP_DONVITINH
data.value: Nên chọn đơn vị quy đổi nhỏ nhất của sản phẩm (Ví dụ: Chọn "Lon" thay vì "Thùng") để tiện cho việc báo cáo tồn kho và hao hụt.

data.name: ERR_TICKET_NO_GATE
data.value: Ticket product requires at least 1 gate access right.

data.name: ERR_RENTAL_NO_PRICE
data.value: Rental product has no price set.

data.name: ERR_PRICE_OVERLAP
data.value: Bảng giá "{0}" bị chồng lấp thời gian. Dòng kết thúc {1} nhưng dòng sau lại bắt đầu {2}

data.name: ERR_DUP_UNIT_GRID
data.value: This unit already exists in the list.

data.name: MSG_UNSAVED
data.value: Unsaved data! Do you want to save before switching?

data.name: TXT_KHONG_CAU_HINH
data.value: This product has no custom configuration

data.name: TXT_CHON_ANH
data.value: Click here to select an image

data.name: ERR_CTK_MA_RONG
data.value: Warehouse voucher code cannot be empty.

data.name: ERR_CTK_TRUNG_KHO_XUAT_NHAP
data.value: Issuing and receiving warehouses cannot be the same.

data.name: ERR_CTK_DA_DUYET
data.value: This voucher has been approved and locked.

data.name: ERR_CTK_DA_DUYET_TRUOC_DO
data.value: This inventory voucher has already been approved.

data.name: ERR_CTK_KIEMKE_THIEU_KHONHAP
data.value: Inventory voucher is missing receiving warehouse.

data.name: ERR_CTK_KIEMKE_THIEU_KHOXUAT
data.value: Inventory voucher is missing issuing warehouse.

data.name: ERR_CTK_THIEU_KHONGUON_KHODICH
data.value: Missing source or destination warehouse info.

data.name: MSG_CTK_DUYET_OK
data.value: Inventory voucher approved! Stock quantities updated.

data.name: ERR_LOHANG_THIEU_SANPHAM
data.value: Missing product info for the batch.

data.name: ERR_LOHANG_NSX_TUONGLAI
data.value: Manufacture date cannot be in the future.

data.name: ERR_LOHANG_HSD_NHO_HON_NSX
data.value: Expiration date cannot be earlier than manufacture date.

data.name: CTX_TAO_PHIEU_XUAT
data.value: Create issue voucher for this item

data.name: TOOLTIP_TONAM_DESC
data.value: Warehouse (like Kitchen) can issue goods before entry voucher. System will show negative inventory (-).

data.name: TOOLTIP_KHOAO_DESC
data.value: No physical location. Used for intermediate processing. Does not support negative inventory.

data.name: MSG_WARN_UNSAVED
data.value: Unsaved voucher! Navigating away will lose draft data. Continue?

data.name: ERR_CHONNGAY
data.value: Please select a valid voucher date!

data.name: POS_WATERMARK_BARCODE
data.value: Scan barcode or type product name...

data.name: POS_MSG_XOAGIO
data.value: Clear entire cart? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ERR_POS_GIO_RONG
data.value: Cart is empty, nothing to checkout.

data.name: ERR_POS_CHUA_MO_PHIEN
data.value: Cashier session not open. Please open session before selling.

data.name: ERR_POS_TIEN_KHONG_KHOP
data.value: Total payment does not match the bill. Please check again.

data.name: ERR_POS_RFID_KHONG_DU
data.value: RFID wallet balance is insufficient for this payment.

data.name: ERR_POS_RFID_KHONGTIMTHAY
data.value: RFID card '{0}' not found in the system.

data.name: ERR_POS_PHIEN_DANG_MO
data.value: This POS has an open session by another user.

data.name: POS_BARCODE_HINT
data.value: Scan barcode or type product name...

data.name: MSG_POS_CONFIRM_CLEAR_CART
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear the entire cart?

data.name: ERR_POS_NO_SESSION
data.value: Please open a cashier session before checking out.

data.name: ERR_KM_HET_LUOT
data.value: Promotion code has reached usage limit

data.name: ERR_KM_DON_TOI_THIEU
data.value: Order does not meet minimum value for promotion

data.name: ERR_KM_DIEU_KIEN
data.value: Customer not eligible for this promotion

data.name: MSG_REFUND_CONFIRM
data.value: Are you sure you want to refund? This process is irreversible!

data.name: ERR_REFUND_NO_ITEMS
data.value: Please enter refund amount for at least 1 product!

data.name: ERR_RFID_MA_RONG
data.value: RFID card code cannot be empty.

data.name: ERR_RFID_KHONG_TIM_THAY
data.value: RFID card not found in the system.

data.name: ERR_POS_RFID_NOT_FOUND_OR_INACTIVE
data.value: RFID card not found or inactive

data.name: ERR_POS_MACHINE_IN_USE
data.value: This POS machine is in use by another staff

data.name: ERR_POS_ALREADY_OPENED_SESSION
data.value: You already have an active cashier session

data.name: ERR_AUTH_EMPTY
data.value: Please enter both username and password!

data.name: MSG_CONFIRM_LOGOUT
data.value: Are you sure you want to log out?

data.name: AI_ERR_NO_KEY
data.value: API Key not configured. Open Settings to setup.

data.name: AI_MOD_KH
data.value: Manage customers, RFID wallet, loyalty points

data.name: AI_APP_GUIDE
data.value: DAI NAM APP USER GUIDE: - Create Order: Lobby > Retail POS > Scan barcode/type name > Checkout - Import Goods: Inventory & F&B > Inventory Hub > Create Voucher > Import - Export Goods: Inventory & F&B > Inventory Hub > Create Voucher > Export - View Stock: Inventory & F&B > Inventory Hub > Current Stock Tab - Add Customer: Admin > Customers > Click Add New - Find Customer: Admin > Customers > Type in search box - Manage Combos: Category > Combo > Create or edit - Permissions: Admin > Permissions

data.name: AI_ERR_TIMEOUT
data.value: Request timed out. Please try again.

data.name: AI_ERR_MAX_LOOPS
data.value: AI reached max processing loops. Please ask briefly.

data.name: AI_SUG_TTKHO_3
data.value: How to create an import voucher

data.name: AI_SUG_KH_2
data.value: Who has the highest loyalty points?

data.name: AI_SUG_POS_2
data.value: How to scan customer RFID card

data.name: ERR_MASP_CHI_TIENTO
data.value: Product code cannot contain only prefix. Please type more or scan barcode.

data.name: ERR_HESO_KHONGHOPLE
data.value: Conversion rate must be a valid positive number

data.name: ERR_LUOI_CONG_RONG
data.value: Turnstile access grid cannot be empty

data.name: ERR_NGAY_KHONGHOPLE
data.value: Valid To date must be after Valid From date

data.name: ERR_ANH_SAIDINHDANG
data.value: Invalid image format. Only jpg, png, gif, webp are accepted

data.name: ERR_LUOI_VE_QUA1DONG
data.value: Game ticket can only be configured for 1 access area

data.name: ERR_CONTONKHO
data.value: Product is still in stock, cannot be deleted

data.name: ERR_CONDONHANG
data.value: Product is in an unclosed order, cannot be deleted

data.name: MSG_POS_CART_NOT_EMPTY
data.value: Cart is not empty, are you sure you want to cancel?

data.name: MSG_POS_MULTI_RESULT
data.value: Multiple products found, please select one

data.name: ERR_REFUND_OVER_QTY
data.value: Refund quantity cannot exceed purchased quantity

data.name: PARTIAL_TICKET_SCANNED
data.value: Ticket has been scanned and cannot be refunded

data.name: MSG_COMBO_TYLE_CHUA_DU
data.value: Total allocation ratio has not reached 100%. The system automatically sets Combo to 'Draft' to ensure revenue safety.

data.name: ERR_RENTAL_RFID_REQUIRED
data.value: Please scan customer RFID before checkout.

data.name: ERR_RENTAL_TAISAN_KHONG_TIM_THAY
data.value: Asset not found with this barcode.

data.name: ERR_RENTAL_TAISAN_DANG_THUE
data.value: Asset is currently rented or already in cart.

data.name: ERR_RETURN_SL_VUOT_QUA
data.value: Return + Lost qty cannot exceed rented qty.

data.name: ERR_RETURN_PHAT_CHUA_NHAP
data.value: Penalty amount not entered for lost items.

data.name: RETURN_PENALTY_DESC
MSG_SP_FNB_MISSING_BOM
data.value:
This processed F&B product has no Material Quota declared. If saved, POS cashiers selling this item will NOT deduct any inventory.
Are you sure you want to continue saving?

data.name: RENTAL_PENALTY_EXCEED
data.value: Penalty exceeds deposit. Extra payment of {0} required.

data.name: ERR_CTK_THIEU_KHO_CHENH_LECH
data.value: Missing variance warehouse (KHO_CHENH_LECH). Please run Seed Data.

data.name: ERR_CTK_DA_HUY
data.value: This voucher has been cancelled and cannot be modified.

data.name: ERR_CTK_CHUA_DUYET_CAP1
data.value: Voucher has not passed level 1 approval (ChoDuyet2).

data.name: ERR_NGAY_GIA_HAN_PHAI_LON_HON_NGAY_CU
data.value: Extension date must be after original check-out date!

data.name: ERR_VUOT_SO_NGUOI_TOI_DA
data.value: This room allows a maximum of {0} guests!

data.name: ERR_PHIEU_DA_CHECKIN_HUY
data.value: Only pre-booked reservations can be cancelled

data.name: GATE_SAI_KHU_VUC
data.value: Ticket not applicable for this area.

data.name: GATE_SAI_TRO_CHOI
data.value: Ticket not applicable for this game.

data.name: ERR_CHONDOITAC
data.value: Please select a partner (supplier or customer)!

data.name: ERR_KHO_TRUNG
data.value: Source and destination warehouses cannot be the same!

data.name: ERR_CONSTRAINT_DATE_FROMTO
data.value: "From date" cannot be later than "To date"!

data.name: ERR_TIEN_PHU_THU_INVALID
data.value: Please enter a valid surcharge amount (>0)!

data.name: ERR_GHI_CHU_INVALID
data.value: Please enter a note (e.g. Broken glass, laundry...)!

data.name: ERR_SDT_INVALID
data.value: Invalid phone number. Please enter at least 10 digits!

data.name: ERR_KHONG_AP_DUNG_DONG_THOI_KM_VA_DIEM
data.value: Cannot apply both promotion and points.

data.name: ERR_CHUA_MO_PHIEN
data.value: Please open a cashier session before payment.

data.name: ERR_DAT_PHONG_KHONG_TON_TAI
data.value: Booking information does not exist or has been deleted!

data.name: MSG_DON_DEP_ROOM
data.value: Confirm room cleaning is finished? Status will be changed to Available.

data.name: MSG_RESET_PHONG_TRONG
data.value: No active booking found for this room. Do you want to RESET the room status to 'Empty'?

data.name: MSG_DIEM_VUOT_GIA_PHONG
data.value: Points to use exceed room price. Please reduce the points!

data.name: ERR_SYS_PHU_THU_KHONG_TON_TAI
data.value: System product SYS_PHU_THU is not configured in the database. Please contact the administrator.

data.name: ERR_CHECKOUT_TIEN_KHONG_DU
data.value: Insufficient payment amount. Please verify the payment before checking out.

data.name: ERR_NGAY_BAT_DAU_LON_HON_KET_THUC
data.value: Start date cannot be later than end date!

data.name: ERR_SP_MISSING_PRICE
data.value:
Product price list is missing!
Please add at least one selling price to make it available for business.

data.name: TT_THEM_MON
data.value: Add selected product to POS Menu

data.name: MSG_MENU_EMPTY
data.value: No items yet. Please search and double click/add from Product Warehouse.

data.name: MSG_DIEMBAN_EMPTY
data.value: No POS has been configured yet.

data.name: LBL_KM_AND_HINT
data.value: Conditions use AND logic. For OR, create separate promotions.

data.name: TIP_KM_TEN
data.value: Short descriptive name for the promotion

data.name: TIP_KM_DON_TT
data.value: Minimum order total required to apply this promotion

data.name: TIP_KM_CHONG_CHEO
data.value: Can be stacked with other promotions

data.name: MSG_KM_XOA_CONFIRM
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this promotion?

data.name: ERR_KM_GIA_TRI_SAI
data.value: Discount value must be greater than 0.

data.name: ERR_KM_NGAY_SAI
data.value: Start date must be before end date.

data.name: ERR_NO_ROOM_DATA
data.value: No room data available for Check-out!
